# GitHub Labels

Suggested labels for Flavor Odyssey:

| Label           | Purpose                                                |
| --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| `bug`           | Broken behavior or regression                          |
| `enhancement`   | Scoped improvement                                     |
| `documentation` | README, docs, release notes, or setup                  |
| `frontend`      | Next.js, UI, animation, audio, or showcase work        |
| `backend`       | FastAPI, persistence, auth, or services                |
| `ai`            | Provider, agent, memory, or prompt work                |
| `accessibility` | Keyboard, screen reader, contrast, or reduced motion   |
| `performance`   | Bundle, render, asset, or runtime optimization         |
| `release`       | Versioning, deployment, showcase, or release checklist |
| `blocked`       | Needs external input or dependency                     |
